subcodes.first_line: O thou servant near to the Divine Threshold! That which thou didst address to Jinab-i-Áqá Siyyid Taqí was noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مقرب درگاه کبریا آنچه بجناب آقا سید تقی مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
